lessons_learned: Plan response semantics improved (Approve now reports needs_inputs instead of workflow_planned when execution actually ran).
Agent hard timeouts no longer surface as AGENT_TIMEOUT hard failures.
Rerun/diff paths still unstable under mixed run-id formats and unresolved artifact binding.
remediation_applied: Action-verb execute intent detection with word-boundary matching.
Artifact-aware filtering when resolving session run IDs for rerun/diff.
